name: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk
summary: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk develops, produces, and sells pharmaceuticals, vitamins, supplements, and traditional herbal care products in Indonesia. The company operates in two segments, Pharmaceutical Products and Toll Manufacturing Services, and Medical Equipments. It offers analgesic, antipiretic, anti anemic, anti fungal, anti hypertension, anti parkinsonism, anti rheumatics, anti inflammatory, anti tuberculotic, anti ulcerant and antasida, antibiotic, anticoagulant, anti platelet, fibrinolytic, anticonvulsant, antihistamine, antipsychotic, calcium w/vitamin, central muscle relaxant, cholesterol lowering, and cough and cold remedy products. The company also provides genito-urinary system, eye preparation, hematology, hepatoprotector, immunomodulator, multivitamin and mineral, neurological, nootropic and neurotonic, oral antidiabetics and corticosteroid, peripheral vasodilator and cerebral activator, supplement and adjuvant therapy, anti infective, anti virus, beta-adrenergic agonist bronchodilator, diuretic, hyperuricemia, and gout products, as well as antiemetic and GIT regulators. In addition, it trades in medical equipment. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
